ValidationRule.description: The Lessor,Head Lessor and Head Lessor 2 should be unique
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Loan', OR( AND(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lesor__c), !ISBLANK(leaseworks__Head_Lesor__c),leaseworks__Lesor__c = leaseworks__Head_Lesor__c), AND(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Head_Lesor__c), !ISBLANK(leaseworks__Head_Lesor_II__c),leaseworks__Head_Lesor__c = leaseworks__Head_Lesor_II__c), AND(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lesor__c), !ISBLANK(leaseworks__Head_Lesor_II__c),leaseworks__Lesor__c = leaseworks__Head_Lesor_II__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Lessor and Head Lessors must be unique
